name: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Food Pouch - Rabbit & Duck Chunks in Jelly 400g
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Nourish your feline with Reflex Plus Rabbit & Duck Wet Food, carefully formulated with natural proteins and vitamins to maintain optimal health, coat shine, and daily nourishment.
description: Reflex Plus Rabbit & Duck Chunks in Jelly Adult Cat Food in Pouch , fully-balanced, rabbit & duck protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 8.0 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 5.0 Crude Fiber (%) - 2.0 Moisture (%) - 0.3 Crude Ash (%) - 83 Vitamin D3 - 250 IE/kg Vitamin E - 15 mg/kg Copper -1.0 mg/kg Biotin - 20g/kg Manganese - 1 mg/kg Zinc - 15 mg/kg Taurine - 445 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives (5% rabbit, 5% duck), minerals, inulin (0,1%) FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: One pouch per meal. An adult cat (approx. 4kg) requires up to 3 meals per day. Individual requirements depend on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. Store in a cool, dry place. Not fit for human consumption.
